name: io.github.entia-systems-core/entity-verification
title: ENTIA Entity Verification
description: 5,220,360 verified business entities across 34 countries (exact live count from get_platform_stats). Deep Spain coverage: BORME 40.3M mercantile acts, REPS healthcare, IBEX 35, plus VIES, GLEIF, Wikidata, Companies House, INSEE/Sirene. Real-time entity lookup, trust scoring, KYB-ready for AI agents. Free tier: 100 req/day.
